description: General-purpose adjectives for describing items across all settings.
adjectives: Worn by countless years, carrying the weight of ages.
Gleaming with the warm luster of gold.
Clear and sparkling like cut glass.
Shining with the cool gleam of moonlight on metal.
Hard, heavy, and unyielding as forged steel.
Deep red and precious, glowing like captured fire.
Locked in ice, cold to the touch and still.
Famous in story and song, spoken of with awe.
Unseen by the eye, present only by its effects.
Possessing a voice and opinions of its own.
Cracked and damaged, but perhaps still useful.
Concealed from sight, waiting to be discovered.
Small enough to fit in the palm of a hand.
Wreathed in flickering heat and flame.
Coated in the fine powder of neglect and time.
Empty inside, light and echoing when tapped.
Producing a clear, ringing tone of its own accord.
Separated from its owner, adrift and unclaimed.
Warm-toned metal with a greenish patina of age.
Smooth green stone, cool and carved with care.
Made from carved and polished timber.
Covered in a soft green layer of living moss.
Turned to stone over ages, heavy and ancient.
Lush and green with growing life.
